name: KKR & Co. Inc.
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. is a global investment firm offering asset management and insurance services. Its asset management business spans private equity, real assets, credit, and hedge fund partnerships. Its insurance business operates through Global Atlantic, a financial group offering retirement and life insurance products. KKR manages a wide array of funds, CLOs, BDCs, and separately managed accounts for institutional and individual investors worldwide.

products.name: Private Equity Funds
products.description: Investment funds focused on private equity strategies for institutional and individual investors.

products.name: Real Assets Funds
products.description: Investment vehicles targeting real estate and infrastructure asset classes.

products.name: Credit Funds
products.description: Investment funds and CLOs focused on credit strategies including leveraged loans and structured products.

products.name: Business Development Companies (BDCs)
products.description: Publicly registered investment vehicles providing credit and equity capital to middle-market companies.

products.name: Global Atlantic Insurance Products
products.description: Retirement and life insurance products offered through Global Atlantic Financial Group.

products.name: Strategic Investor Partnerships
products.description: Separately managed accounts with long investment periods across multiple strategies for select investors.

products.name: Hedge Fund Partnerships
products.description: Strategic minority-stake partnerships with third-party hedge fund managers.

partnerships.description: KKR acquired Arctos Partners as part of business expansion mentioned among strategic transactions.
KKR completed acquisition of KKR Holdings and 258.3 million KKR Group Partnership Units on May 31, 2022.
Japanese real estate asset manager acquired by KKR on April 28, 2022.
